title: hewwo friends
description: Small modpack featuring new biomes, exploration, boats, and primarily create for anything automation or railway related.
body:
A small pack I made for me and my friends. New blocks, biomes, boats, railways, and create with a bunch of addons. Tantalizing stuff. Exploration and showmaker for all.

Comes with just over 100 mods relating to client side visuals, shaders, exploration and create. There is a plethora of new blocks to build stunning things with. Also has controllify for controller compatibility.

Naturalist will add a bunch of new animals to help make your world feel alive.

There are also some QOL mods to make life just a bit easier.
